scripts.check: npm run check:required && npm run check:json && biome check .
scripts.check:required:theme-files: find web card package -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec sh -c 'for dir in "$@"; do if [ ! -f "$dir/index.html" ]; then echo "Missing index.html: $dir"; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f "$dir/meta.json" ]; then echo "Missing meta.json: $dir"; exit 1; fi; done' sh {} +
scripts.check:json: npm run check:json:meta-schema && npm run check:json:meta && npm run check:json:schema
scripts.check:json:meta: find web card package -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec sh -c 'for dir in "$@"; do ajv validate --spec=draft7 -s schemas/meta.schema.json -d "$dir/meta.json" || exit 1; done' sh {} +
scripts.check:json:schema: find web card package -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec sh -c 'for dir in "$@"; do if [ -f "$dir/schema.json" ]; then ajv compile --spec=draft7 -s "$dir/schema.json" || exit 1; fi; done' sh {} +
